title: Sunrise City
description: A bright and energetic pop track with high danceability and low acousticness, ideal for morning motivation and upbeat commutes.
mood_summary: Happy and positive, with high valence and energy.
listening_context: Perfect for starting the day, workouts, or driving with the windows down.

title: Midnight Coding
description: A mellow lo-fi beat with moderate energy and high acousticness, featuring a chill vibe and steady tempo.
mood_summary: Chill and relaxed, suitable for focused work or late-night sessions.
listening_context: Great for coding, studying, or unwinding after a long day.

title: Storm Runner
description: An intense rock track with very high energy, fast tempo, and low acousticness, evoking a sense of power and intensity.
mood_summary: Intense and energetic, with low valence for a darker tone.
listening_context: Ideal for high-intensity workouts, running, or releasing built-up energy.

title: Library Rain
description: A soft lo-fi track with low energy, high acousticness, and a relaxed tempo, mimicking a quiet library atmosphere.
mood_summary: Chill and peaceful, perfect for concentration.
listening_context: Excellent for studying in libraries, reading, or background music during quiet tasks.

title: Gym Hero

mood_summary: Intense and happy, boosting motivation with high valence.
